We determine an application as a unit that's removed from your website in the last 7 days.
So you can actually click on this to see which units we deemed to have been applied to.
Typically that takes about 7 days for a potential renter to be approved.
Once that unit stays offline for 7 days, we're going to capture it as a lease.
Now, if it's relisted during that time, you'll see it here under the relisted units.

Yeah, so first and foremost to address your statement regarding applications, you're totally right.
Anytime that a unit is removed from a website, apartment IQ will see it as an application.

So whether that's them taking units down, uh, in the instance that you explain, or just simply removing the unit to maybe put it under construction, you're correct, we're going to count that as an application within the system.
Now, to address your question with the concessions, you're right, apartment IQ can only pull in what's published publicly.
The biggest thing that I like to address with especially property managers and marketing teams, is that when you set up your concessions, initially,
It has to be set up in one of two ways.

You're either publishing it for the property level, or if it's a unit specific concession, you're typically tying that to very individualized units to present the individualized units in which it's applicable to.

A lot of times I'll have people tell me, hey, the concession here says 1 month free rent, but that actually only applies to my two bedrooms, and then I usually ask them the question, well, how did you set up your concession?
Did you set it up as a Property wide concession or as a unit specific concession, and they go, oh,
and so if it's not tied to specific units or floor plans or bed types, apartment IQ is going to mass apply it to all units at the property.
So that is something to note.
Now, we aren't able to include word of mouth concessions.
That's another thing that people typically ask about is it like walk-in concessions that aren't published.
We won't be able to identify those.
Now, how we're actually getting the concession details, the first place we look is the property website.
We're pulling in upwards of 97% of concessions out there on the market right now.
There of course are exceptions in which we miss sometimes, but if there are instances in which we miss something, just let us know.
Our team will make sure that we check to see what's going on, so that way we make sure it's pulled in accurately.
And that it's not displayed inaccurately on uh the concession section here.
